title: NPV: The NPV of a merger can be calculated by subtracting...
summary: Assess merger value creation using NPV analysis comparing synergies to acquisition costs.
prompt: The NPV of a merger can be calculated by subtracting the price paid for the target from the combined value of the acquirer and target.
solution: The NPV of a merger represents the additional value created for the acquirer by combining with the target, calculated as the difference between the synergy created and the price paid for the target.
